title: canariopsis altissima
intro: Canariopsis altissima, also known as the Canariopsis tree, is a tropical plant native to the African island of São Tomé. The bark and leaves of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Canariopsis altissima include treating fever, pain, and various skin conditions, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance their effects.
